review_title: Machine Learning-Based System for Cardiopulmonary Sound Separation
phase: Phase 7 manual full-text access exclusion update
notes: Phase 2 audited only the 20 PDFs already present in literature-review/papers/pdfs.
No new searches, downloads, restricted PDFs, or publisher logins were performed.
Maybe papers are retained for background, datasets, preprocessing, metrics, or general audio separation context.
Excluded papers remain recorded for PRISMA tracking; no PDF files were deleted.
phase_3_notes: Only public metadata APIs were queried.
No publisher, university, IEEE, ScienceDirect, Springer, or ResearchGate login was attempted.
Restricted or non-open-access records are queued for manual Zotero/university-access handling by the user.
phase_4_notes: Reviewed only title, abstract, keywords, DOI, source, and notes for the 50 Phase 3 metadata candidates.
No PDFs were downloaded and no restricted portals were accessed.
Priority 1 records should be downloaded first through Zotero/manual university access by the user.
Disease-only and weak off-scope records were downgraded to Maybe or Exclude.
notes_after_year_range_update: No papers or PDFs were deleted.
No new searches, downloads, or logins were performed.
All pre-2022 records were retained for PRISMA tracking and marked Exclude.
Only 2022-2026 records remain eligible for Include or Maybe.
notes_after_manual_access_update: No records or PDFs were deleted.
No searches, downloads, logins, or credential handling were performed by Codex.
Manual full-text access exclusions are retained for PRISMA tracking.
The enhanced VMD paper remains Maybe because online full text is readable even though PDF download is unavailable.

decision_changes.P030: Include -> Maybe after full-text weakness check

notes_after_phase_6: Audited only newly downloaded local PDFs.
No new searches, downloads, logins, record deletions, or PDF deletions were performed.
P027 remains online-only metadata/full text and was not excluded because the PDF is unavailable.
phase_6_verification: Completed local verification on 2026-05-12: 37 PDFs matched, 17 newly downloaded PDFs audited, 0 unmatched PDFs, P027 remains online-only, P069 arXiv metadata corrected from local PDF text; no PRISMA count changes required.
notes_after_phase_7: Phase 7 used public metadata APIs and public metadata pages only.
No PDFs were downloaded and no publisher, university, IEEE, ScienceDirect, Springer, ResearchGate, IOP Science, or ASTM login was attempted.
Weak diagnosis-only or general-audio records were retained as Exclude for PRISMA traceability and are not recommended for Zotero download.
The older HLS-CMDS arXiv preprint was detected as a duplicate and not added; P038 remains the published IEEE Data Descriptions paper.
